# Security Policy

## Reporting a Vulnerability

If you discover a security vulnerability, please report it responsibly.

You can contact the maintainer at:

**📧 Email:** lorenzo@lukather.net  

Please do **not** open a public GitHub issue for security problems.

We will acknowledge receipt of your report within **48 hours** and aim to provide a resolution or status update within **7–14 days**.

## Supported Versions

Only the latest released version of this project receives security updates.

## Disclosure Process

- We will investigate the issue and confirm its impact.
- If a fix is required, we will prepare a patch and coordinate a release.
- We may request additional information to reproduce or understand the vulnerability.
- Once resolved, we will publish a security advisory following coordinated disclosure best practices.

Thank you for helping keep this project secure.
